name: Choice Privileges® Select Mastercard®

welcome_offer.description: Earn 60,000 Choice Privileges bonus points after spending $3,000 in purchases in the first 3 months.

earning_rates.notes: 10x points on qualifying stays at participating Choice Hotels properties.
5x points on eligible gas station purchases.
5x points on eligible grocery store purchases.
5x points on eligible home improvement store purchases.
5x points on eligible phone plan payments.
1x point per $1 on all other purchases.

other_benefits.name: 30,000 anniversary bonus points
other_benefits.description: Earn 30,000 bonus points every account anniversary, enough to redeem up to 3 reward nights at select Choice Hotels properties.

other_benefits.name: No foreign transaction fees
other_benefits.description: No foreign transaction fees on international purchases.

sources.notes: Official Wells Fargo Choice Privileges Select Mastercard page; verified via search snippets and page title 2026-06-13.
Official Wells Fargo Choice Privileges cards overview; anniversary bonus corroboration.
Choice Hotels press release corroborating 60k offer and 30k anniversary bonus.
U.S. News secondary review for offer/status cross-check.

notes: Select version with $95 annual fee, 60k welcome offer, automatic Choice Privileges Platinum status, and 30k anniversary bonus points.
